recognized.desc: 通过JCI认证及ISO认证的机构，配备现代设备、经验丰富的专家及国际质量标准。

affordable.title: 实惠的医疗
affordable.desc: 相比美国和西欧节省40–60%，同时获得相当的临床效果和优质护理。

fast.title: 快速就诊专家
fast.desc: 无需漫长排队。通过我们的协调预约系统，几天内即可安排会诊和治疗。

packages.title: 医疗旅游套餐
packages.desc: 一次预订即包含治疗、住宿、接送、口译及康复支持的全包套餐。

umc-heart-center.description: UMC心脏中心是中亚领先的心脏专科机构之一，开展复杂开胸心脏手术、支架植入和心律失常治疗。国际患者因其JCI认证标准、经验丰富的心脏外科医生和专业国际协调团队而选择此处。

national-scientific-medical-center.description: 阿斯塔纳国家科学医学中心是一家高科技医院，专注于心脏外科、神经外科和先进心脏病学。作为复杂病例的国家级转诊中心，拥有现代化手术室、重症监护设施和多学科专家团队。

national-hospital-almaty.description: 总统事务管理局下属国家医院是哈萨克斯坦最受尊敬的多学科医疗机构之一。提供具有JCI认证的外科、诊断和康复服务，是阿拉木图国际患者寻求优质医院护理的可靠选择。

syzganov-surgery-center.description: Syzganov国家科学外科中心是阿拉木图的旗舰外科医院，在器官移植、骨科和复杂普通外科方面拥有深厚专业实力。国家认证和研究驱动的方法吸引了需要复杂手术干预的患者。

mediker-hospital-almaty.description: Mediker国际医院提供多学科医疗服务，设有完善的国际患者部门和英语工作人员。尤其以种植牙、美容手术和为外国访客提供的协调护理套餐而闻名。

shymkent-heart-center.description: 奇姆肯特心脏中心自2000年以来专注于心脏病学和心脏外科。与西方市场相比价格更为亲民，同时配备现代化导管室、手术室和心脏康复项目。

shymkent-diagnostic-center.description: 奇姆肯特市诊断中心是一家现代化机构，集先进影像、牙科和门诊手术于一体。国际患者看重其高效诊断、透明定价以及位于哈萨克斯坦南部医疗区的便利位置。

ekomed-ivf-shymkent.description: Ekomed生殖医学与试管婴儿中心是一家专业诊所，提供试管婴儿、卵胞浆内单精子注射和生育力保存项目。来自独联体和中东地区的夫妇因其个性化护理和具有竞争力的治疗套餐而选择Ekomed。

umc-mother-child.description: 阿斯塔纳UMC母婴中心是一家JCI认证机构，专注于生殖医学、试管婴儿、产科和新生儿科。其综合性妇女健康园区提供从生育咨询到怀孕和分娩的全程支持。

alanda-clinic-astana.description: Alanda诊所是阿斯塔纳的一家现代化多学科医疗中心，提供重建外科、骨科和住院康复服务。国际患者欣赏其精品医院环境和个性化治疗规划。

american-medical-centers-almaty.description: 阿拉木图American Medical Centers遵循国际临床标准，提供家庭医学、高管体检和牙科服务。外籍人士和医疗游客经常使用AMC进行预防性筛查、牙科护理和英语初级诊疗。

testimonials.title: 受到全球患者信赖
testimonials.subtitle: 来自美国、欧洲、独联体及中东的国际患者分享他们的MedTour体验。

1.quote: MedTour让一切都很顺畅——从选择诊所到预订酒店。相比伦敦价格我节省了50%以上，并在阿拉木图的Premium Dental Center获得了卓越护理。

2.quote: 联络中心协调了我的整个旅程。口译支持、机场接送和复诊预约都处理得很专业。体验极佳。

3.quote: 在比较了欧洲各地的方案后，我们选择了哈萨克斯坦做试管婴儿。7天套餐包含了我们所需的一切。Almaty IVF Institute团队超出了我们的预期。

4.quote: 作为一名美国患者，我对JCI认证的机构和透明的定价印象深刻。在我订机票之前，医疗专员就回答了每一个问题。

5.quote: 我通过MedTour为我在德国的表亲做了推荐。统一平台让我们能在一处轻松比较诊所、套餐和住宿。真正的一体化生态系统。

6.quote: 自始至终都很专业。14天套餐让我有时间一边康复一边游览阿斯塔纳。患者协调团队在每一步都给予我支持。

cardio-checkup.description: Comprehensive cardiac screening including ECG, blood tests, and specialist consultation at accredited partner clinics.

mens-checkup.name: Men's Health Check-up

executive-checkup.name: Executive Health Check-up
executive-checkup.description: Premium multi-day screening with advanced diagnostics and specialist reviews.

ct-abdomen.name: CT Abdomen Scan

ct-angiography.name: CT Angiography
ct-angiography.description: Contrast-enhanced CT for blood vessel assessment.

mri-spine.description: MRI of cervical, thoracic, or lumbar spine segments.

mri-joint.name: MRI Joint

mri-cardiac.name: Cardiac MRI
mri-cardiac.description: Specialized MRI for heart structure and function.

us-thyroid.name: Thyroid Ultrasound
us-thyroid.description: Ultrasound of thyroid gland and neck structures.

us-pregnancy.name: Pregnancy Ultrasound

root-canal.description: Endodontic treatment for infected tooth pulp.

therapeutic-massage.name: Therapeutic Massage
therapeutic-massage.description: Medical massage for pain relief and recovery.

clinics.title: 选择合作诊所
clinics.subtitle: 为您的医疗项目选择认证医院
clinics.nextStepDesc: 该城市有 {count} 家认证合作诊所提供此项目。

mobile.homeHint: 选择城市、类别和医疗项目

home.howSubtitle: 从选择城市到选择诊所——为国际患者提供的清晰路径。
home.benefit1Desc: 联系前即可查看预估价格，无隐藏费用。
home.benefit2Desc: 每家诊所均符合国内或国际标准。
home.benefit3Desc: 24/7协调员协助预约、出行和随访。

categoryDetailsSuffix.check-up: Programs are delivered at internationally accredited partner hospitals with multilingual coordinators. Most check-ups can be scheduled within a few days for medical travelers.
categoryDetailsSuffix.ct: CT imaging uses modern multi-slice equipment with reports prepared by experienced radiologists. International patients receive clear documentation for follow-up care at home.
categoryDetailsSuffix.mri: MRI studies use high-field scanners for precise soft-tissue evaluation. Partner clinics coordinate scheduling, interpreter support, and result delivery.
categoryDetailsSuffix.ultrasound: Ultrasound is a safe, radiation-free diagnostic tool for screening and monitoring. Appointments are often available on short notice.
categoryDetailsSuffix.dentistry: Dental care is provided in clinics equipped for implants, prosthetics, and cosmetic dentistry with transparent pricing for international visitors.
categoryDetailsSuffix.xray: Digital radiography offers rapid imaging with minimal radiation. Results are reviewed promptly and shared for your home physician.
categoryDetailsSuffix.massage: Therapeutic massage supports recovery after travel or treatment. Sessions are tailored to your health status and comfort.
categoryDetailsSuffix.functional-diagnostics: Functional tests evaluate heart, lung, and metabolic performance non-invasively to support accurate diagnosis.
categoryDetailsSuffix.treatment-room: Minor procedures and infusions are performed under medical supervision — ideal for travelers needing same-day outpatient care.
categoryDetailsSuffix.certificates: Certificates are issued after a physician confirms fitness for work, sport, or travel per common international requirements.
categoryDetailsSuffix.cardiology: Cardiology services include advanced diagnostics and access to interventional specialists at leading cardiac centers.
categoryDetailsSuffix.gynecology: Women's health services are delivered with privacy and cultural sensitivity following international clinical standards.
categoryDetailsSuffix.neurology: Neurology consultations address headaches, seizures, and nerve conditions with access to EEG and imaging when needed.
categoryDetailsSuffix.orthopedics: Orthopedic specialists treat joint pain, sports injuries, and degenerative conditions with conservative and surgical options.
categoryDetailsSuffix.ophthalmology: Eye care ranges from routine exams to refractive surgery assessments using modern diagnostic equipment.
categoryDetailsSuffix.urology: Urology services cover prostate health, kidney conditions, and men's health screening with discreet professional care.
categoryDetailsSuffix.surgery: Surgical consultations include candidacy assessment, hospital selection, and pre-operative test coordination.
categoryDetailsSuffix.pediatrics: Pediatric care covers routine check-ups, vaccinations, and childhood illnesses in family-friendly environments.
categoryDetailsSuffix.dermatology: Dermatology addresses acne, eczema, moles, and skin concerns with biopsy and treatment options on site.
categoryDetailsSuffix.endocrinology: Endocrinology care focuses on thyroid disorders, diabetes, and hormonal imbalances with laboratory support.
